text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Today is the day.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Well then, trainers, let me hear your answers. Why do you wish to be
my trainer?

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
I'll kick things off. As I said the other day, I guarantee you'll become
even stronger under my tutelage—strong enough to stand on that
podium as a champion.

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
This is a three-year training plan. I put all the knowledge and effort I
could muster into it.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Superb. Even just glancing at it, I can tell that it's a well thought out
plan. I'll take a closer look shortly.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Next would be...

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Me, yes. It's true that you have boundless potential—so much so that
some trainers are hesitant to work with you.

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text: But I want to see you fulfill your potential. I'm prepared to do whatever it takes to guide you to certain victory!

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
I've laid out a report with winning race strategies based on an analysis
of your runs. Please take a look!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Hmm... Impressive work. I'll look at it in more detail shortly.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
And now... Last but not least, I turn to you. Why do you wish to be my
trainer?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
You said you wanted to see more of my running. In other words, you
spoke of your belief in my future potential.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Illustrate to me, please, what that would entail. What future would
you seek for me?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: In response to her question, I show her the photo I took yesterday.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Is this... a photograph of me? When I brought Grass Wonder and
Maruzensky together?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: So this... is the answer you brought for me?
choice_data_list: This is the future I wish to seek with you.
This is the future I wish to seek with you.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: ...I see. With me, huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, Symboli Rudolf carefully reads the documents put together
by the other trainers.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But ultimately...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry to turn you both down like this after you put in so much
work.

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text: ...A tremendous pity, but I understand.

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
We'll leave the rest to you. Help her achieve greatness—we're
holding you to that.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two trainers look back regretfully as they make their way off the
track.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
They were excellent trainers. Any student would flourish under their
guidance.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Why did I choose you? Isn't it obvious?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
You made an effort to look at the world from my perspective. And
that... made me happier than I expected.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
What I aim for, every day of my life, is to create a world where
Umamusume can live in bliss. That's what I've been running full-speed
toward this entire time.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
But, well... I think there was a part of myself that considered it a
naïve, faraway dream.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
But you're different! I could tell you were willing to go the extra mile,
but I didn't expect someone who shared the same vision!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Knowing that brings me so much joy.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Having someone who shares my aspirations—who would seek this
future with me by my side... it fills my heart with a reassuring warmth.
choice_data_list:
I'm the one who's thrilled to have you by my
side.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Turning the tables on me, are you? Hahaha! I'm flattered that you feel
that way!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Well then—let's make it official, shall we?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I am Symboli Rudolf. I stand here at the starting gate with my eyes on
one goal: a world where all Umamusume can live in bliss.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
But idle talk won't get me anywhere. I must back my words with deeds
worthy of attention and respect.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
That is why I am aiming for the top—so that I may be a ruler worthy of
her crown.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Much time has passed since I first came to the academy. I spent my
days serving as the student council president, but now the hour is
nigh.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Will you help me take the throne, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Excellent. That's what I wanted to hear! We'll make the name Symboli
Rudolf one to remember.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Both of us, together.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Time passed quickly after that.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Soon enough, the day of Symboli Rudolf's debut race is upon us, and
before I know it...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Thank you for your cheers and well-wishes, everyone!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Yeaaaaaah! Woooo!!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf—what a powerhouse! Such an exceptional
performance!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: This victory is surely only the beginning of her blazing path to glory!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: ...High praise indeed.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Heh, looks like we both have great expectations to live up to!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her smile spreads to the people in the stands, capturing countless
fans—and this is still only the first race of her journey!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: S-so cool!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: So that's... Symboli Rudolf!
